title: Briefing No. 015 — MCP-native HCM and ATS
summary: Compact ratified four MCP servers (graph, console, recruiter, connectors). Positioning shifts from 'MCP-compatible' to 'MCP-native'. Cordova named first design partner. Core decisions: D-256 (Compact unanimous, four-server commitment), D-258 (Forge — people-graph IS the MCP server, signed-JWT auth with tenant·agent·scope), D-263 (Helm & Compass — positioning line adopted across homepage, deck, narrative this fortnight).
